economic_notes: Rights Reconciliation Agreement on Fisheries signed April 16, 2021 with Canada. Listuguj Fisheries Fund Trust established September 21, 2021 for increased fisheries access. Commercial fisheries is a major economic activity. Joint arrangement with Mi'gmawei Mawiomi Business Corporation Inc. Investment in Les Crevettiers Marinard Inc. and formerly E. Gagnon & Fils (repaid during year).
notes: Three consolidated subsidiaries: Listuguj Mi'gmaq Government Land Acquisition Corporation, Listuguj Mi'gmaq Government Development Center, Notre-Dame Land Inc. One joint arrangement (Mi'gmawei Mawiomi Business Corporation Inc.) accounted for at cost. Listuguj Fisheries Fund Trust not consolidated. Land Settlement Trust Fund of $15.89M included on both sides of balance sheet. Comparative figures restated due to ISC program review adjustments totalling significant restatements. Remuneration schedule referenced (pages 30-31) but not included in extracted text. Province is Quebec (QC). OSR calculated as total revenue $108,234,503 minus total government transfers per Note 24 of $73,930,277 = $34,304,226. Expenses_salaries_total estimated from segment disclosure salaries lines. Annual debt service is principal repayments only per cash flow statement.
